title: New Columns/Custom Views

posts.author: ricky.thomas (Ricky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello Monday.com team,

I’d like to suggest a feature related to custom board views. Right now, when a new column is added to the main table, it automatically appears in all custom views. Since most custom views are set up for very specific needs, we usually end up having to manually hide those new columns one by one on each board view.

It would be really helpful if new columns were hidden by default in custom views, and then users could choose to unhide them if they’re needed. This would save time and keep each view focused on what’s most relevant.

Thanks for considering this!

What are you trying to achieve

We want to keep custom board views clean and focused without extra manual work. Right now, when new columns are added to the main table, they automatically appear in every custom view, even if they’re not relevant. The goal is to have new columns hidden by default in custom views, so users only see them if they choose to unhide them.
